# Sean Taylor

> BAFTA-winning games industry veteran, exec producer, product architect, fractional CPO, and author. Made in Scotland, based in Dubai.

## Identity

- Name: Sean Taylor
- Location: Dubai, UAE (originally Scotland)
- Website: https://seantaylor.work
- Notes: https://notes.seantaylor.work
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrseantaylor/
- Substack: https://playhaus.substack.com/archive
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kwangchow/
- X: https://x.com/kwangchow

## What I do

Exec Producer, Product Architect and Fractional CPO with 30 years in games and interactive entertainment. I advise, write, build labs and run experiments. I provide specialist consultancy and strategic advisory to the games industry, public sector, and higher education in the UK and MENA.

## Key achievements

- Started career at DMA Design (now Rockstar North) during production of the original Grand Theft Auto. Credits include GTA, GTA 2, and Body Harvest
- Produced Quarrel from vertical slice to award-winning IP at Denki, winning a BAFTA and three TIGA Awards
- Founded and led InGAME (Innovation for Games and Media Enterprise), the UK's national games innovation centre — 177 R&D projects, £85M in economic impact, 16x return on £5.3M public investment in five years (2018–2023)
- Co-authored "Punk Playthings: Provocations for 21st Century Game Makers" (CRC Press, 2017) with Chris Lowthorpe
- Shipped 100+ games across console, mobile, web and emerging platforms for brands including Family Guy, Fox, Heineken, Lego, Mad Libs, Mattel, Moshi Monsters, Nestlé, Reebok, Scooby Doo, Shrek, and Star Wars

## Domains of expertise

- Video game production and design
- Executive production and product architecture
- R&D and innovation strategy
- Creative industries policy and public sector advisory
- Games education and skills development
- Playful design and interactive experiences
- Studio and publisher consultancy
- Fractional CPO / leadership

## Current projects

- Playhaus: the Playful Media Lab (with Dr Chris Lowthorpe)
- SVLT: playful product studio
- Attention Yield: consultancy framework
- Denki Dojo: experimental project

## Site structure

- / — Landing page (highlights, follow links)
- /notes — Blog and notes (hosted on Bear Blog at notes.seantaylor.work)
